scope: AgenC TUI renderer (runtime/src/tui/ink/) ↔ openclaude src/ink/ strict parity for the differential-repaint, reconciler, and frame-production layer. Removes AgenC-only divergences — the patches were rationalized in source comments but produce visible artifacts and reduced smoothness. yoga-layout is intentionally NOT in scope: both projects already use the same pure-TypeScript port (openclaude src/native-ts/yoga-layout vs AgenC runtime/src/tui/ink/vendored/yoga-layout), so there is no swap to perform.

requiredBehaviors: renderBorder reads node.yogaNode!.getComputedWidth() and getComputedHeight() through Math.floor (matches openclaude src/ink/render-border.ts:89-90)
no Math.round on Yoga computed sizes — round-then-render misaligns border vs child clear/fill rounding causing every-other-frame phantom rows/columns on bordered widgets

the AgenC-only comment claiming Math.floor 'leaves the right/bottom border one cell short' is removed: the comment was added in commit 880e07f8 'Revert merge local openclaude watch parity' and reflects a regression rationalization, not a real bug

TTY frame diff does NOT prepend an unconditional { type: 'styleStr', str: '\x1b[0m' } at the head — matches openclaude src/ink/log-update.ts which trusts stylePool.transition() to compute correct per-cell SGR transitions
every diff frame's first wire byte is governed by the same per-cell stylePool transition path as every subsequent cell — no head reset bypassing the optimizer's empty-transition skip
the AgenC-only commentary about 'random cells showing up styled' is removed alongside the SGR-0 push: the optimizer/stylePool path is the source of truth
no forceFullRepaintNextFrame field on the Ink class — matches openclaude src/ink/ink.tsx (only prevFrameContaminated and didLayoutShift drive full-damage diffs)
resize handler does NOT set a forced-full-repaint sentinel; it relies on the same prevFrameContaminated/didLayoutShift propagation openclaude uses
log-update render() signature does not carry a forceFullRepaint argument — full-damage decisions are owned inside log-update from screen.damage flags
no double full-screen repaint on layout shift: the post-shift frame is incremental in both repos
onRender does NOT snapshot terminal dimensions, drop a finished diff, and reschedule via microtask when the terminal resizes mid-pass — matches openclaude which trusts the throttled scheduler
no AgenC I-66 mid-pass-resize-restart code path: the next SIGWINCH naturally schedules a fresh render with the updated dimensions
render-node-to-output.i66.test.ts is removed alongside the restart code — that test defends the removed AgenC behavior

notifySelectionChange calls onRender() synchronously on every selection update — matches openclaude src/ink/ink.tsx: no scheduled-mode parameter, no sameSelectionEndpoints/sameSelectionSpan endpoint-equality short-circuit
selection drag highlights repaint on the same tick as the input event — no leading-edge frame interval latency
tui-stress-regressions.test.tsx selection-drag tests are updated to reflect the immediate-notify path (drag coalescing is intentionally removed for parity)

reassertTerminalModes pops-and-pushes the Kitty keyboard stack (DISABLE_KITTY_KEYBOARD + ENABLE_KITTY_KEYBOARD + ENABLE_MODIFY_OTHER_KEYS) when supportsExtendedKeys() — matches openclaude src/ink/ink.tsx:933-939
the pop-before-push pattern keeps Kitty stack depth at 1 instead of accumulating on each call
guard runs BEFORE the altScreenActive early-return so non-alt-screen sessions still reassert keyboard modes
kitty reassert is gated by isPaused and isTTY checks in the same order openclaude uses
App component receives the same prop set openclaude passes — no AgenC-only onInputActivity prop threaded through ink.tsx tree → App
if AgenC needs an input-activity hook, it lives outside the React render path so memoized parents are not invalidated by an extra prop
root.ts onInputActivity field removed alongside ink.tsx tree wiring
